# Tianyuan Waterproof (TY-SHIELD™)

> Leading manufacturer of high-quality modified bitumen membranes, polymer membranes, and waterproof coatings for global construction.

## Core Products
- [Bitumen Membranes](https://www.tyuanwaterproof.com/categories/bitumen-membranes/): SBS/APP modified waterproofing solutions.
- [Polymer Membranes](https://www.tyuanwaterproof.com/categories/polymer-membranes/): TPO, EPDM, PVC high-performance membranes.
- [Waterproof Coatings](https://www.tyuanwaterproof.com/categories/waterproof-coatings/): Liquid-applied high-elasticity coatings.
- [Geosynthetics](https://www.tyuanwaterproof.com/categories/geosynthetics/): HDPE geomembranes and nonwoven geotextiles.

## Technical Resources
- [Technical Center](https://www.tyuanwaterproof.com/technical/): Detailed TDS, installation guides, and FAQ.
- [Project Cases](https://www.tyuanwaterproof.com/projects/): Global success stories in infrastructure and industrial roofing.

## About Company
Located in Shouguang, China, Weifang Tianyuan Waterproof Material Co., Ltd. has 30+ years of manufacturing expertise and export service to 50+ countries.
